---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with Shortcuts-Custom
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Press hotkey '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages shown in the popup or system tray.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- Shortcuts-Custom version: (e.g., v1.0.0)
- Windows version: (e.g., Windows 11 23H2)
- AutoHotkey version (if running from source): (e.g., v2.0.11)
- Running from: (e.g., `.ahk` source, compiled `.exe`)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
